Video.summary: After three classical Strongman events – Dead lift, Loading and Front hold – and one historical, Chopper Pull for the first time in history of Strongman, now we go to find out who will take title in Romania. This is the second stage in Romania and it remains to be seen who will win the title; Aivars, Travis or Krzyzstof?
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 11, Romania (Part 2)

Video.summary: The next destination of Strongman Champions League is in a piece of paradise on earth – Curacao. We bring to you some special Strongman events like the Rock Lift, Tug of War and Weight for Height in this episode.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 12, Curacao (Part 1)

Video.summary: This is the last competition before the grand finals. After the first three events Zageris is in top place, but can O’Hagan, Baggott, Petursson and Ortmayer step into the final? Last chance some of them will find through events like Forward Hold, Truck Pull, Dead Lift and loading very big objects.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 13, Curacao (Part 2)

Video.summary: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. We also go to Poland and Germany to represent one day in the training of Krzysztof Radzikowski and Dennis Kohlruss. See all the finalists for Mexico in their comfort zone here, with their backgrounds /motivations /family and friends.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 14, Road to Mexico

Video.summary: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 15, Mexico - World Finals (Part 1)

Video.summary: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 11, Romania

Video.summary: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 12, Curacao

Video.summary: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan

Video.summary: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece

Video.summary: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)

Image.alt: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)

Video.summary: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)

Image.alt: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)

Video.summary: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We’ll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway - World Strongest Viking

Video.summary: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It’s a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power

Image.alt: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power
SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany - FIBO Power

Video.summary: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 3, Abu Dhabi

Video.summary: Strongman classic in land where there is no place for anything else excepts strength, fight and endurance. Here are fourteen of the strongest men, fighting for the title of strongest in Holland.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)

Video.summary: We go back to Holland, where former champion Dainis Zageris is in leading position after the first three events. Alongside Radzikowski, he is in this moment favorite for world title, and also leader shirt holder.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)

Video.summary: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. Here we have Matjaz Belsak, wearing SCL leader shirt, one of the biggest strongman in the World Mika Torro, fan favorite strongman in all over the World – Will Baggott, and also big name from Baltic – Aivars Smaukstelis
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 6, Finland

Video.summary: Twelve strongman, including defending Worldchampion Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia , will compete on “Air spa” for the title of best in homeland country of Tesla, Pupin, Novak Djokovic. Matjaz Belsak is the SCL leader in this competition, chasing his third victory this season.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 7, Serbia

Video.summary: The World championship in lightweights of the Strongman Champions League bring to us 50 strongmen from all over the world. All athletes are under 105 kilograms and for them this is the step up to the ultimate heavyweights.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 8, Finland - U105 (Part 1)

Video.summary: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 9, Finland - U105 (Part 2)

Video.summary: The first part of SCL Romania 2018 will be hosted in Brasov. This episode features a new event for Strongman Champion League: “ The Chopper Pull”!
Video.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 10, Romania (Part 1)

Video.summary: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 7, Canada (Part 2)

Video.summary: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)

Video.summary: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)

Video.summary: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship

Image.alt: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
